meaning: n.一种印刷用纸,拿津贴的学生
examples: He is the author of several themes for Nouvelle Vague movies made by Claude Lelouch, Jean-Luc Godard or Jacques Demy.
The Netherlands were boosted by news that the jaw injury suffered by Demy de Zeeuw was not as bad as first feared.
Documentary footage shows Demy in the last year of his life, reminiscing about his childhood and adolescence in the coastal town of Nantes.
